top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN s.County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM schools s
WHERE s.MailState = 'CA';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN s.County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM schools s
WHERE s.MailState = 'CA';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN s.County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM schools s
WHERE s.MailState = 'CA';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM schools 
WHERE MailState = 'CA' 
  AND County IN ('Colusa', 'Humboldt');

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN s.County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM schools s
WHERE s.MailState = 'CA';
